channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Crypto convict Sam Bankman-Fried requests pardon from Trump
item.description: Sam Bankman-Fried, once hailed as a crypto poster boy, is now seeking a presidential pardon from Donald Trump.

item.title: California allows late ballots without postmark, raising fraud concerns
item.description: The election has once again highlighted California's controversial and insecure mail-in ballot rules.

item.title: Gordon Wood's straightforward approach to history
item.description: Through his measured and rigorous scholarship, the historian was one of the last of his era.

item.title: Trump curse? President's teams lose all three major games
item.description: President Trump has frequently attended major sporting events in his second term, and a pattern has emerged that fans and critics have noted...
